PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
SELECT(COUNT(DISTINCT ?hero) AS ?count) ?decade WHERE {
  ?hero wdt:P31 / wdt:P279 * wd:Q207513 .
  ?hero wdt:P21 wd:Q6581097 .
  ?hero wdt:P5280 ?appearance .
  ?appearance wdt:P123 ?publisher .
  ?publisher wdt:P749 * wd:Q173496 .
  ?appearance wdt:P577 ?date .
  FILTER(DATATYPE(?date) = xsd:dateTime)
  BIND(SUBSTR(STR(?date) , 1 , 4) AS ?yearStr)
  BIND(CONCAT(SUBSTR(?yearStr , 1 , 3) , "0") AS ?decadeStart)
  BIND(CONCAT(?decadeStart , "s") AS ?decade)
}
GROUP BY ?decade
ORDER BY ?decade
